case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. BENJAMIN W ROWLAND

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $282.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100030429)*** REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT NOT CLERK*** AS TO DEFENDANT ROWLAND, BENJAMIN W
